data.title: Peter Schiff Counters Bitcoin's Safe Haven Narrative Amid Forecast Of Impending Fiat Train Wreck: 'There Is No Riskier Asset'
data.description: Renowned economist and market commentator Peter Schiff labeled Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), the world’s largest cryptocurrency, as the riskiest asset on Tuesday.

data.title: After Apple Halts 'Hardware' Subscription Plans, Samsung Unveils Similar Strategy For AI-Powered Galaxy Smartphones
data.description: Apple was exploring this model to increase its revenue streams

data.title: Faraday Future's FX 6 To Target $30K-$50K Price Range With AI-Driven EV Tech: Details
data.description: Faraday Future's FX brand updates include new logo and product details for its AI-powered vehicles, with production expected to begin by late 2025.

data.title: Tesla Directors Receives Court Approval For Settlement In Excess Pay Case
data.description: Tesla directors including Chair Robyn Denholm have reportedly gotten court approval for a settlement to resolve allegations that they overpaid themselves.

data.title: Here's How To Watch Former President Jimmy Carter's State Funeral Online
data.description: Former President Jimmy Carter's state funeral service will be held on Jan.9, followed by private funeral in Plains, GA.
